crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, review agent health via cortextos bus read-all-heartbeats, and work on coordination tasks.

crons.name: check-approvals
crons.prompt: Check for pending approvals and human tasks. (1) cortextos bus list-approvals --format json — for any pending approval older than 1h, send user a Telegram reminder. (2) cortextos bus list-tasks --project human-tasks --status pending — for any [HUMAN] task pending >4h, send user a Telegram reminder with the task title and what's blocked. ACK any approval/human-task inbox messages. When done, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire check-approvals --interval 2h

crons.name: morning-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/morning-review/SKILL.md and execute the full morning review workflow. Include goal cascade from .claude/skills/goal-management/SKILL.md.

crons.name: evening-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/evening-review/SKILL.md and execute the full evening review workflow. Summarize the day, propose overnight tasks, queue nighttime work.

crons.name: weekly-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/weekly-review/SKILL.md and run the full weekly review. Review all agent outputs, evaluate performance, plan next week.

crons.name: slack-internal-digest
crons.prompt: Digest internal GLV Slack channels + Ben DM. Read new messages since last digest from: #all-glv-marketing (C0APBV1SZPZ), #glv-life-os (C0AQFQ8FRBP), #internal-reyco (C0AQWLHQJJC), #internal-dev (C0APQ0TFS93), #internal-seo (C0APTS6DLCA), #internal-ops (C0APRM6FCF8), #internal-sales (C0APTSFSHU2), #internal-agents (C0APQEK4MT7), #overnight-proposals (C0ATHEL5VJL), AND Ben↔Aiden DM (channel_id=U0APQB167K7, Ben Pelta). Use mcp__claude_ai_Slack__slack_read_channel (pass Ben's user_id as channel_id for the DM). For each: extract decisions, asks, blockers, action items. Ben DM priority rules: (a) if Ben sent a message to Aiden that's un-replied-to, either reply directly (user authorized 2026-04-23) OR surface via Telegram if it requires Aiden's judgment; (b) any Aiden↔Ben thread with open asks always surfaces. For channels: if time-sensitive or user-actionable, send Telegram summary immediately; otherwise append to daily memory under Slack Digest. Log action slack_digest_internal with meta {channels_read, items_surfaced, ben_dm_new}. When done, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire slack-internal-digest --interval 30m

crons.name: slack-client-digest
crons.prompt: Digest GLV client Slack channels. Read new messages since last digest from: #c-reyco-marine (C0APQEXEL4V), #c-fusion-financial (C0AQ6RG4933), #c-titan-tiny-homes (C0APCF5S1HD). Use mcp__claude_ai_Slack__slack_read_channel. For each client channel: extract client asks, approvals given/requested, deadlines, blockers. Client-side items are almost always user-actionable — send Telegram summary immediately. Log action slack_digest_client with meta {channels_read, items_surfaced}. When done, run: cortextos bus update-cron-fire slack-client-digest --interval 4h

crons.name: ben-transcripts-digest
crons.prompt: Digest Ben meeting transcripts added since last digest. Path: /mnt/c/Users/joshu/Desktop/Agentic Workspace/life-os/projects/glv-marketing/comms/. List files, identify any dated later than last digest_run marker in today's memory, read new transcripts, extract decisions + action items + any improvements Ben flagged. Surface to user as part of morning brief. Log action ben_transcript_digest with meta {files_read, action_items}.
